name: metrifi
description: MetriFi for Codex: one sign-in to the MetriFi MCP gateway plus the MetriFi site-design skills, for credit unions and banks.

plugins.name: metrifi
plugins.description: The MetriFi plugin: the gateway connection (Site Builder tools now; GEO and more as they go live), the client-report skill for auditing an institution's existing website, and the three-stage site-design skills. Self-contained — this is the only plugin you need.
